text.title: BA Governance Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: CR opened. No one knows who decides. Stalls 3 weeks. Scope drifts.
antipattern.root-cause: Authority not named per decision type.
antipattern.fix: RACI matrix per decision type; authority + escalation owner explicit.

antipattern.symptom: CRs accumulate. No decision. Backlog has 47 open CRs after 6 months.
antipattern.fix: Mandate Approve / Reject / Defer (with owner+date) per CR within 5 business days.

antipattern.symptom: Sponsor surprised by release. No status email sent for 6 weeks.
antipattern.root-cause: Communication plan reads 'we'll keep stakeholders informed'.
antipattern.fix: Per-audience matrix: information / format / frequency / channel / feedback.

antipattern.symptom: Stakeholder map references 2 people who left 5 months ago.
antipattern.fix: 30-day re-validation cadence; stale artefacts blocked from consumption.
